# Kukode
> A curated directory of production-grade websites, design systems, and Astro/HTML templates — for designers, developers, and creative professionals.

## Main sections
- [Home](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/): Curated production websites, daily site of the day, leaderboard.
- [Leaderboard](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/leaderboard/): Weekly / monthly / all-time top-voted sites.
- [Submit](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/submit/): Submit a product or site for review.
- [Store](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/store/): Premium Astro and HTML templates.
- [Blog](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/blog/): Articles on design systems, typography, front-end tooling.
- [About](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/about/): What Kukode is and who it is for.
- [Pricing](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/pricing/): Subscription plans.
- [Advertise](https://kukode.treonstudio.com/advertise/): Sponsored article and newsletter ad packages.

## Optional: Key facts
- Multi-locale: English (default), Bahasa Indonesia, Bahasa Banjar, Basa Jawa, Bahasa Melayu.
- Authentication: email/password, passkeys (WebAuthn), Google OAuth.
- Backed by Turso (libSQL) and deployed on Cloudflare Workers.
- Open submissions via /submit/.

## Contact
- Site: https://kukode.treonstudio.com
- Support: support@kukode.treonstudio.com
